case_title: MEE KIN FONG VS. SOO YUEN BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONG, MEE KIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOO YUEN BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION HOLLYWOOD TOO, LLC $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,725.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST AARON FONG IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PKAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST CALVIN LOUIE, CHEN HSING CHIANG AND KATY CHAN (INDIVIDUALLY) ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO INCLUDE ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT, HOLLYWOOD TOO. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2012 Set For Trial On Jan-25-12 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 602

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-25-2012 Continued To Jan-25-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-25-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Not Reported. (602)

APPEARANCES:
Brian McClellan of the Law Offices of Brian McClellan representing the Defendant/Appellant, Soo Yuen Benevolent Association is present.

Defendant/Appellant Calvin Louie DBA Hollywood Too, LLC is present.

Plaintiff/Respondent Mee Kin Fong is present.

Cantonese-English Interpreter (Non-Certified) Lydia Fong is present on behalf of the Plaintiff/Respondent.
-----------------------------------------------------------

This matter comes on calendar for a Small Claims Appeal having been assigned by Master Calendar. The court, clerk, litigants, interpreter and witness are present in open court.

At 11:12 a.m., the court and counsel McClellan confer on a stipulation reached amongst the parties. It has been agreed upon that there are $7,500.00 worth damages due to the fire and that the fire started in the Hollywood Too, LLC unit. Counsel and counsel confer on the remaining issue of the case.

At 11:15 a.m., defendant/appellant Benelovent's witness JAMES KONG is sworn and examined.

Benevolent's Exhibit 2 is identified; the 9/1/08 Commercial Lease.

At 11:19 a.m., Mr. Louie conducts cross examination.

Benevolent's Exhibit 1 is identified/admitted; 8/9/10 Fire Cause Analysis Report. Exhibit 2 is also admitted into evidence at this time.

At 11:22 a.m., witness JAMES KONG is thanked and excused. There are no further witnesses.

The court evaluates the admitted exhibits and reviews facts with counsel McClellan. The court hears argument from counsel McClellan as well as Mr. Louie. The court questions Mr. Louie regarding the fire.

At 11:28 a.m., the parties submit the matter for ruling. The court finds that Hollywood Too, LLC violated the lease and caused the fire. Judgment is in favor of the plaintiff/respondent Mee Kin Fong in the amount of $7,500.00 plus costs.

At 11:29 a.m., this matter is adjourned.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-03-2012 Continued To Jan-25-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-15-2011 Judgment Entered
